title: piliostigma malabaricum
intro: Piliostigma malabaricum, also known as Piliostigma reticulatum, is a tree species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. It is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, and is also valued for its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in powder or capsule form for its health benefits.
